betterquesting:10.desc:8:
My Ascension to Mission. 
The third journey of the self, affirmed by its surrender.
Vethea, for awareness.
Gallifrey, for motivation.
Kashan, for purpose.
Human, mortal, finite. And yet, in tune with the Infinite.
Burning with power, humbled by service.
The universe has a plan, and I am part of this plan.
Death is not the end of the story, and I am here to guide those who who need a hand in continuing.
Lost time can give important lessons, and I will impart these lessons to those who could not learn on their own.
History is a book that can be read, and I will carry the lives of the unwitnessed.
My Mission is one I exercise in the open.
My Mission is one I exercise out of genuine desire.
My Mission is one I exercise with pride.
My Mission is one I exercise through companionship.
This mission I accept. Not out of righteousness. Not out of desire.
I accept this Mission, because it is mine to accept. Because my detiny has led me here, and because I trust my destiny.
The field of the Infinite, Recursion, has a plan for the Universe, and I will be an agent for this plan.
Here is my vow. Here is my pledge. Here is my Mission.
